purpose: Deterministic blocker packet for New Hampshire while the current official host families remain either unresolvable or publicly access-denied.
packet_complete_when: New Hampshire can reopen only when at least one reviewed first-party official host family either resolves publicly for Medicaid/DD/EI and county-office lanes or exposes a public export or browser-reviewable directory for education, VR, or district offices.

blocker_classes.finding: The successor-host family saved into the packet does not resolve in bounded review and cannot remain verified statewide evidence.
The public-facing official roots and exact leaves return the same short Access Denied shell, so low-token path guessing will not repair these families.
The likely public-assistance/VR alternate host does not resolve and should not remain in an active New Hampshire review lane.
